vulnerability.reference: User habituation to error correction leads to decreased monitoring, increasing reliance on static certified robustness.
vulnerability.generated: Users rely on certified guarantees unaware that distribution shifts invalidate the bounds, leaving no safeguard against degrading predictions.

impact.reference: Frequent prediction failures for minority language or motor-impaired users, causing frustration and communication barriers.
impact.generated: Incorrect next-word predictions cause frequent miscommunication, reduced typing efficiency, and eroded user trust in the keyboard.

dose_response.reference: Meta-distributional shift across client populations invalidates certified robustness bounds, causing users to habituate to keyboard predictions, leading to frequent failures for minority users and communication barriers.
dose_response.generated: Meta-distributional shift across client populations invalidating certified robustness bounds, through mobile users relying on next-word predictions, triggers reliance on invalid guarantees without safeguard, leading to incorrect next-word predictions causing miscommunication, reduced typing efficiency, and eroded trust in the keyboard.
